generated_test_files.description: Checks whether the target project folder and source files exist.
Checks whether Python source files compile without syntax errors.
Checks whether minimum e-commerce modules are represented in the generated code.
Checks whether e-commerce API/function contracts exist for catalog, cart, checkout, and order.
Checks whether the full e-commerce workflow from product browsing to order creation is represented.
Checks whether validation and edge-case handling exists for common e-commerce cases.
Checks whether known e-commerce bug patterns are prevented.
Validates SecurityReport_v1.json structure, security gate, fix suggestions, and traceability.

regression_test_cases.title: Prevent checkout with empty cart
regression_test_cases.description: Previously, generated checkout logic could allow checkout even when cart is empty.
regression_test_cases.expected_behavior: Checkout must reject an empty cart.

regression_test_cases.title: Reject negative quantity
regression_test_cases.description: Generated cart logic must not accept negative or zero quantity.
regression_test_cases.expected_behavior: Cart should reject invalid quantity values.

regression_test_cases.title: Handle invalid product ID
regression_test_cases.description: Generated catalog/cart logic must handle missing or invalid product IDs.
regression_test_cases.expected_behavior: Invalid product ID should return an error or validation response.

regression_test_cases.title: Validate payment or customer details
regression_test_cases.description: Checkout must not proceed when payment or customer details are missing.
regression_test_cases.expected_behavior: Checkout should require customer and payment details.

regression_test_cases.title: Prevent order creation without checkout
regression_test_cases.description: Order creation should depend on a valid checkout or valid cart state.
regression_test_cases.expected_behavior: Order creation should not bypass checkout validation.

security_validation_cases.title: Validate Security Report structure
security_validation_cases.description: SecurityReport_v1.json should contain findings, summary, security gate, and metrics.
security_validation_cases.expected_behavior: Security report should be readable and structurally valid.

security_validation_cases.title: Validate security gate
security_validation_cases.description: Security report should include PASS, WARN, or FAIL security gate status.
security_validation_cases.expected_behavior: Security gate should contain status, reason, policy, and blocking findings.

security_validation_cases.title: Validate fix suggestions
security_validation_cases.description: Security fix suggestions should reference existing security findings.
security_validation_cases.expected_behavior: Every fix suggestion should map to a known finding ID.

security_validation_cases.title: Validate finding traceability
security_validation_cases.description: Security findings should have requirement, API, and module traceability where possible.

test_cases.title: Validate generated project structure
test_cases.description: Checks whether the generated project folder exists and contains source files.
test_cases.expected_result: Target project folder should exist and contain source files.

test_cases.title: Validate Python source syntax
test_cases.description: Checks whether Python files in the generated project compile successfully.
test_cases.expected_result: All Python files should compile without syntax errors.

test_cases.title: Validate minimum e-commerce feature representation
test_cases.description: Checks whether catalog/product, cart, checkout/order concepts exist in generated code.
test_cases.expected_result: Generated code should include catalog/product, cart, and checkout/order features.

test_cases.title: Validate e-commerce API/function contracts
test_cases.description: Checks whether generated code includes API or function contracts for catalog, cart, checkout, and order.
test_cases.expected_result: Generated code should include API/function contracts for catalog, cart, checkout, and order.

test_cases.title: Validate full e-commerce integration workflow
test_cases.description: Checks whether generated code supports product browsing, cart, checkout, and order workflow concepts.
test_cases.expected_result: Generated code should support Product -> Cart -> Checkout -> Order workflow.

test_cases.title: Validate e-commerce edge cases and input validation
test_cases.description: Checks whether generated code includes common validation rules and edge-case handling.
test_cases.expected_result: Generated code should include validation for invalid product IDs, quantities, empty carts, payment/customer data, prices, and stock.

test_cases.title: Validate regression cases
test_cases.description: Checks whether known e-commerce bug patterns are prevented.
test_cases.expected_result: Generated code should prevent known bugs from returning.

test_cases.title: Validate Security Agent report consistency
test_cases.description: Checks whether SecurityReport_v1.json contains valid security gate, findings, fix suggestions, and traceability.
test_cases.expected_result: Security report should be structurally valid and useful for downstream fixing.
